name: GIGABYTE X870E EAGLE X3D WIFI7 ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-9000(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C with DP-Alt - HDMI 2.1 - 5GbE LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (X870E EAGLE X3D WIFI7)
shortName: GIGABYTE X870E EAGLE X3D WIFI7 ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: High-end AM5 ATX motherboard with X3D support, PCIe 5.0, DDR5-9000, and Wi-Fi 7.
